---
title: "Camila Gonzalez Silva CV"
output:
  pagedown::html_paged:
    css: ["styles.css"]
    self_contained: true
params:
  pdf_mode: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(yaml)
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(purrr)
library(knitr)
library(htmltools)

`%||%` <- function(a, b) {
  if (!is.null(a) && !is.na(a) && length(a) > 0 && a != "") a else b
}

info <- yaml::read_yaml("data/info.yml")
education <- readr::read_csv("data/education.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)
research <- readr::read_csv("data/research_experience.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)
teaching <- readr::read_csv("data/teaching_experience.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)
community <- readr::read_csv("data/community_engagement.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)
publications <- readr::read_csv("data/publications.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)
languages <- readr::read_csv("data/languages.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)
skills <- yaml::read_yaml("data/skills.yml")

escape_html <- function(x) {
  htmltools::htmlEscape(x)
}

render_header_links <- function(info) {
  links <- c(
    if (!is.null(info$links$linkedin) && info$links$linkedin != "") {
      sprintf('<a href="%s">LinkedIn</a>', info$links$linkedin)
    },
    if (!is.null(info$links$github) && info$links$github != "") {
      sprintf('<a href="%s">GitHub</a>', info$links$github)
    },
    if (!is.null(info$links$orcid) && info$links$orcid != "") {
      sprintf('<a href="%s">ORCID</a>', info$links$orcid)
    }
  )
  paste(links, collapse = " | ")
}

render_contact_line <- function(info) {
  parts <- c(
    info$location %||% "",
    info$email_primary %||% "",
    info$email_secondary %||% "",
    render_header_links(info)
  )
  parts <- parts[parts != ""]
  paste(parts, collapse = " | ")
}

render_section_title <- function(title) {
  cat(sprintf('<div class="section-title">%s</div>\n', escape_html(title)))
}

render_paragraph <- function(text, class = "body-text") {
  if (!is.null(text) && text != "") {
    cat(sprintf('<p class="%s">%s</p>\n', class, escape_html(text)))
  }
}

render_interests <- function(interests) {
  cat(sprintf('<p class="body-text">%s</p>\n', escape_html(paste(interests, collapse = "; "))))
}

render_education_entry <- function(row) {
  cat('<div class="entry">\n')
  cat('<div class="entry-header">\n')
  cat(sprintf('<div class="entry-title">%s</div>\n', escape_html(row$degree)))
  cat(sprintf('<div class="entry-date">%s</div>\n', escape_html(row$dates)))
  cat('</div>\n')

  cat(sprintf('<div class="entry-subtitle">%s</div>\n', escape_html(row$institution)))

  details <- c(
    row$location %||% "",
    row$notes %||% ""
  )
  details <- details[details != ""]
  if (length(details) > 0) {
    cat(sprintf('<div class="entry-meta">%s</div>\n', escape_html(paste(details, collapse = " | "))))
  }

  if (!is.na(row$thesis) && row$thesis != "") {
    cat(sprintf('<div class="entry-detail"><span class="label">Thesis:</span> %s</div>\n', escape_html(row$thesis)))
  }
  if (!is.na(row$supervisor) && row$supervisor != "") {
    cat(sprintf('<div class="entry-detail"><span class="label">Supervisor:</span> %s</div>\n', escape_html(row$supervisor)))
  }
  if (!is.na(row$distinction) && row$distinction != "") {
    cat(sprintf('<div class="entry-detail">%s</div>\n', escape_html(row$distinction)))
  }

  cat('</div>\n')
}

render_bullet_list <- function(text) {
  items <- str_split(text %||% "", "\\s*\\|\\s*")[[1]]
  items <- items[items != ""]
  if (length(items) > 0) {
    cat('<ul class="cv-bullets">\n')
    walk(items, ~cat(sprintf('<li>%s</li>\n', escape_html(.x))))
    cat('</ul>\n')
  }
}

render_experience_entry <- function(row) {
  cat('<div class="entry">\n')
  cat('<div class="entry-header">\n')
  cat(sprintf('<div class="entry-title">%s</div>\n', escape_html(row$position)))
  cat(sprintf('<div class="entry-date">%s</div>\n', escape_html(row$dates)))
  cat('</div>\n')

  org_line <- c(row$institution %||% "", row$location %||% "")
  org_line <- org_line[org_line != ""]
  cat(sprintf('<div class="entry-subtitle">%s</div>\n', escape_html(paste(org_line, collapse = ", "))))

  if (!is.na(row$project) && row$project != "") {
    cat(sprintf('<div class="entry-project">%s</div>\n', escape_html(row$project)))
  }

  meta_parts <- c()
  if (!is.na(row$principal_investigator) && row$principal_investigator != "") {
    meta_parts <- c(meta_parts, paste0("Principal Investigator: ", row$principal_investigator))
  }
  if (!is.na(row$course_or_unit) && row$course_or_unit != "") {
    meta_parts <- c(meta_parts, row$course_or_unit)
  }
  if (!is.na(row$lecturer) && row$lecturer != "") {
    meta_parts <- c(meta_parts, paste0("Lecturer: ", row$lecturer))
  }

  if (length(meta_parts) > 0) {
    cat(sprintf('<div class="entry-meta">%s</div>\n', escape_html(paste(meta_parts, collapse = " | "))))
  }

  render_bullet_list(row$bullets %||% "")
  cat('</div>\n')
}

render_publication_entry <- function(row) {
  pub_text <- c(
    row$authors %||% "",
    row$title %||% "",
    row$status %||% ""
  )
  pub_text <- pub_text[pub_text != ""]
  cat(sprintf('<div class="publication">%s</div>\n', escape_html(paste(pub_text, collapse = " "))))
}

render_skill_group <- function(title, items) {
  if (!is.null(items) && length(items) > 0) {
    cat(sprintf(
      '<div class="skill-group"><span class="skill-label">%s:</span> %s</div>\n',
      escape_html(title),
      escape_html(paste(items, collapse = "; "))
    ))
  }
}
```

<div class="cv-page">

<div class="name-block">
  <div class="cv-name">`r info$name`</div>
  <div class="cv-contact">`r render_contact_line(info)`</div>
</div>

```{r profile, results='asis', echo=FALSE}
render_section_title("Profile")
render_paragraph(info$profile)
```

```{r research-interests, results='asis', echo=FALSE}
render_section_title("Research Interests")
render_interests(info$research_interests)
```

```{r education-section, results='asis', echo=FALSE}
render_section_title("Education")
education %>%
  mutate(order = ifelse(is.na(order), 999, order)) %>%
  arrange(order) %>%
  split(seq_len(nrow(.))) %>%
  walk(~render_education_entry(.x))
```

```{r research-section, results='asis', echo=FALSE}
render_section_title("Research Experience")
research %>%
  mutate(order = ifelse(is.na(order), 999, order)) %>%
  arrange(order) %>%
  split(seq_len(nrow(.))) %>%
  walk(~render_experience_entry(.x))
```

```{r teaching-section, results='asis', echo=FALSE}
render_section_title("Teaching Experience")
teaching %>%
  mutate(order = ifelse(is.na(order), 999, order)) %>%
  arrange(order) %>%
  split(seq_len(nrow(.))) %>%
  walk(~render_experience_entry(.x))
```

```{r community-section, results='asis', echo=FALSE}
render_section_title("Collective and Community Engagement")
community %>%
  mutate(order = ifelse(is.na(order), 999, order)) %>%
  arrange(order) %>%
  split(seq_len(nrow(.))) %>%
  walk(~render_experience_entry(.x))
```

```{r publication-section, results='asis', echo=FALSE}
render_section_title("Publication")
publications %>%
  mutate(order = ifelse(is.na(order), 999, order)) %>%
  arrange(order) %>%
  split(seq_len(nrow(.))) %>%
  walk(~render_publication_entry(.x))
```

```{r skills-section, results='asis', echo=FALSE}
render_section_title("Methods and Technical Skills")
render_skill_group("Qualitative and Mixed Methods", skills$qualitative_mixed_methods)
render_skill_group("Data Analysis", skills$data_analysis)
render_skill_group("Research and Digital Tools", skills$research_digital_tools)
```

```{r languages-section, results='asis', echo=FALSE}
render_section_title("Languages")
languages %>%
  mutate(
    line = ifelse(
      details == "" | is.na(details),
      paste0(language, " — ", level),
      paste0(language, " — ", level, "; ", details)
    )
  ) %>%
  pull(line) %>%
  walk(~cat(sprintf('<div class="language-line">%s</div>\n', escape_html(.x))))
```

</div>
